CustomField.description: When true, the snapshot writer resolves question content fields through Form_Question_Catalog__c entries (with per-binding Override_Question__c / Override_Required__c applied) instead of reading directly from Form_Question__c. Backfill of catalog entries should happen before flipping this on. See docs/phase-2-pillar-2-question-catalog.md.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Routes question content reads through the catalog model (Form_Question_Catalog__c). Requires the catalog backfill batch to have populated catalog entries for all existing bindings.
CustomField.label: Question Catalog Enabled
